segments.text: Doesn’t wisdom cry out? Doesn’t understanding raise her voice?
On the top of high places by the way, where the paths meet, she stands.
Beside the gates, at the entry of the city, at the entry doors, she cries aloud:
I call to you men! I send my voice to the sons of mankind.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: You simple, understand prudence! You fools, be of an understanding heart!
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Hear, for I will speak excellent things. The opening of my lips is for right things.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For my mouth speaks truth. Wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness. There is nothing crooked or perverse in them.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: They are all plain to him who understands, right to those who find knowledge.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Receive my instruction rather than silver, knowledge rather than choice gold.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For wisdom is better than rubies. All the things that may be desired can’t be compared to it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: “I, wisdom, have made prudence my dwelling. Find out knowledge and discretion.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The fear of Yahweh is to hate evil. I hate pride, arrogance, the evil way, and the perverse mouth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Counsel and sound knowledge are mine. I have understanding and power.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me kings reign, and princes decree justice.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me princes rule, nobles, and all the righteous rulers of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I love those who love me. Those who seek me diligently will find me.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: With me are riches, honor, enduring wealth, and prosperity.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My fruit is better than gold, yes, than fine gold, my yield than choice silver.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I walk in the way of righteousness, in the middle of the paths of justice,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: that I may give wealth to those who love me. I fill their treasuries.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: “Yahweh possessed me in the beginning of his work, before his deeds of old.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, before the earth existed.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When there were no depths, I was born, when there were no springs abounding with water.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Before the mountains were settled in place, before the hills, I was born;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: while as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the beginning of the dust of the world.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When he established the heavens, I was there. When he set a circle on the surface of the deep,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: when he established the clouds above, when the springs of the deep became strong,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
when he gave to the sea its boundary, that the waters should not violate his commandment, 
when he marked out the foundations of the earth,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
then I was the craftsman by his side. I was a delight day by day, 
always rejoicing before him,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: rejoicing in his whole world. My delight was with the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: “Now therefore, my sons, listen to me, for blessed are those who keep my ways.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Hear instruction, and be wise. Don’t refuse it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text:
Blessed is the man who hears me, watching daily at my gates, 
waiting at my door posts.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For whoever finds me finds life, and will obtain favor from Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: But he who sins against me wrongs his own soul. All those who hate me love death.
segments.speaker: Wisdom
